signals.headline: SOUTH KOREA INFLATION RISES TO 2
signals.raw:
SOUTH KOREA INFLATION RISES TO 2.2% IN MARCH 2026, ABOVE BOK TARGET AMID OIL PRICE SURGE | YES | HIGH**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, exceeding the Bank of Korea's 2.0% target due to global energy market volatility from the Iran conflict, though below market forecasts of 2.4%[2][4].
